"[10] [Appended, 22:45:46] [9] [Appended, 22:10:01] [1] IPHONE TC ALERT "
"[8] [Appended, 22:45:46] [2] BLK SDN O/T MULTI TIMES VS SEMI"

Log.Location: "I10 E / County Line Rd Indio Exit 87"

details.IncidentDetail: "[4] #2 FROM COUNTY LINE TO SINGLETON WILL ALSO BE CLOSED "
"[3] COUNTY LINE ONR TO EB 10 CLOSED / AND THE SANDALWOOD OFR // SLOW LANE WILL ALSO BE CLOSED"
"[2] WILL ADV CLOSURE DETAILS "
